scripts.test: npm run test:unit:pure && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit:pure: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/unit/apiError.test.ts tests/unit/apiResponse.test.ts tests/unit/outputHandler.test.ts tests/unit/config.test.ts tests/unit/crypto.test.ts tests/unit/metricsCollector.test.ts tests/unit/languageRegistry.test.ts tests/unit/executionLimiter.test.ts tests/unit/sandbox.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:metrics && npm run test:unit:webhooks && npm run test:unit:language && npm run test:unit:apikey
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:main && npm run test:integration:auth && npm run test:integration:advanced
